- Note: The `risk-report` surface is implemented as a page (`pages/RiskReport`) in this visual design; it can also be opened as a bottom sheet from Home/Records/Inspections. Event names remain the same in both cases.

## 10. Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- Use the teal gradient for primary CTAs and hero metric cards.
- Use warm amber/coral only for severity, overdue, and destructive actions.
- Keep cards softly rounded (18-20px radius) and use subtle shadows.
- Reserve bottom navigation as a floating capsule with generous safe-area padding.
- Use glassy scrim behind sheets and dialogs.
- Give every inline SVG a contextual `<title>` tag.

### Don't
- Don't use additional accent colors beyond teal, amber, coral, and slate.
- Don't use emoji or pictographic Unicode as icons.
- Don't stretch tab bar to full width or place it on the side.
- Don't use black backgrounds; keep the app in a light, airy teal/slate space.
- Don't add noise textures or heavy gradients behind text.

toolUseResult.content:
# Pinankou Design System

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

Pinankou is a safety-first operations app. The visual story is **calm authority**: the interface feels like a clean control room, not a cluttered construction site. Color is used to signal trust (teal), caution (amber), and danger (coral) without ever shouting. Surfaces are softly layered with glassy cards, subtle gradients, and restrained shadows so long lists and dense dashboards remain breathable.

The atmosphere balances two instincts:
- **Reassurance** — patients/clean cool blues and teals suggest the system is under control.
- **Urgency when needed** — warm amber and coral appear only for risk severity, overdue tasks, and destructive actions.

Light mode is the default. There is no dark-mode requirement in v1.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Cool teal/blue-green safety palette with warm amber/coral accent for warnings.
- Soft glass-morphism cards with subtle gradient backgrounds and frosted overlays.
- Large rounded corners (18-28px) for panels and cards; full-pill buttons for primary CTAs.
- Generous vertical rhythm so a very tall screen never feels crowded.
- Bottom tab navigation as a floating capsule, not a hard edge.
- Icons are line-style SVGs, 1.5px stroke, with contextual `<title>` tags.

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **Teal 50** (`#f0fdfa`) — page background wash, lightest canvas.
- **Teal 100** (`#ccfbf1`) — subtle card gradient start, success badge bg.
- **Teal 400** (`#2dd4bf`) — secondary accent, active tab icon, small highlights.
- **Teal 500** (`#14b8a6`) — primary brand color, main CTA fill, header title tint.
- **Teal 600** (`#0d9488`) — pressed primary CTA, link text.
- **Teal 700** (`#0f766e`) — emphasized headings, status "closed".

### Safety/Warning Accents
- **Amber 50** (`#fffbeb`) — warning badge background.
- **Amber 400** (`#fbbf24`) — medium risk indicator.
- **Amber 500** (`#f59e0b`) — warning icon, pending state.
- **Coral 50** (`#fff1f2`) — high risk / destructive background.
- **Coral 400** (`#fb7185`) — high risk dot.
- **Coral 500** (`#f43f5e`) — high risk text, overdue, destructive action.
- **Coral 600** (`#e11d48`) — destructive pressed state.

### Neutrals
- **White** (`#ffffff`) — card surfaces, bottom nav capsule, input backgrounds.
- **Slate 50** (`#f8fafc`) — alternate section background.
- **Slate 100** (`#f1f5f9`) — divider, disabled backgrounds.
- **Slate 200** (`#e2e8f0`) — borders, input borders.
- **Slate 400** (`#94a3b8`) — placeholder, tertiary text.
- **Slate 600** (`#475569`) — secondary text, captions.
- **Slate 800** (`#1e293b`) — primary text, headings.
- **Slate 900** (`#0f172a`) — very strong emphasis.

### Surfaces & Elevation
- **Card background**: `linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f0fdfa 100%)` with `0 10px 25px -8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08)` shadow.
- **Bottom nav capsule**: `#ffffff` with `0 -4px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06)` and 1px `rgba(20,184,166,0.12)` border.
- **Bottom sheet**: `#ffffff` top radius 28px with scrim `rgba(15,23,42,0.45)`.
- **Metric highlight card**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6 0%, #0d9488 100%)` with white text.
- **Warning card**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #fbbf24 100%)` with white/dark text.
- **Danger card**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #f43f5e 0%, #fb7185 100%)` with white text.

### Focus & States
- **Focus ring**: 2px solid `#14b8a6`, offset 2px.
- **Primary CTA hover**: brightness 1.05, translateY -1px.
- **Primary CTA active**: `#0d9488` background.
- **Disabled**: `rgba(148,163,184,0.35)` background, `#94a3b8` text.
- **Selected tab**: `#14b8a6` icon + label, circular badge bg if any.

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Family
- **Display / Headings**: `HarmonyOS Sans SC`, fallback `PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif`
- **Body / UI**: `HarmonyOS Sans SC`, fallback `PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif`
- Numerals in metrics use tabular figures when available (`font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`).

### Hierarchy

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Color |
|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Page Title | 24px | 700 | 1.25 | -0.3px | Slate 800 |
| Section Title | 18px | 600 | 1.3 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Card Title | 16px | 600 | 1.35 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Body Emphasis | 15px | 600 | 1.5 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Caption | 13px | 400 | 1.4 | 0 | Slate 600 |
| Micro | 12px | 500 | 1.35 | 0 | Slate 400 / Teal 600 |
| Metric Number | 32px | 700 | 1.1 | -0.8px | White (on gradient) or Slate 800 |
| Metric Label | 12px | 500 | 1.3 | 0 | White 80% / Slate 500 |
| Tab Label | 11px | 500 | 1.2 | 0 | Slate 400 / Teal 500 active |
| Button Large | 16px | 600 | 1.0 | 0 | White or Slate 800 |
| Button | 14px | 600 | 1.0 | 0 | White or Slate 800 |

### Principles
- Keep Chinese body copy comfortable: line-height 1.5–1.6.
- Metric numbers are big and tight; labels are small and quiet.
- Use weight, not color alone, to create hierarchy.

## 4. Component Stylings

### Buttons

**Primary CTA**
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6 0%, #0d9488 100%)`
- Text: `#ffffff`, 16px, weight 600
- Padding: 14px 24px
- Radius: 999px (full pill)
- Shadow: `0 8px 20px -6px rgba(20,184,166,0.45)`
- Active: scale 0.98, shadow tighter
- Use: main actions like "开始巡检", "提交隐患", "保存记录"

**Secondary Button**
- Background: `#ffffff`
- Border: 1px solid `#e2e8f0`
- Text: `#0f766e`, 14px, weight 600
- Padding: 12px 20px
- Radius: 12px
- Use: "取消", "稍后处理"

**Ghost Button**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#0d9488`, 14px, weight 600
- Padding: 10px 14px
- Radius: 10px
- Active: `rgba(20,184,166,0.12)` background
- Use: inline edit, "查看更多"

**Icon Button / FAB**
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6 0%, #0d9488 100%)`
- Text/icon: white
- Size: 56px circle
- Shadow: `0 12px 28px -8px rgba(20,184,166,0.55)`
- Use: home-page quick-report

### Cards

**Standard Card**
- Background: `linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f0fdfa 100%)`
- Border: 1px solid `rgba(20,184,166,0.10)`
- Radius: 20px
- Padding: 16px
- Shadow: `0 10px 25px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)`

**Metric Card (gradient)**
- Background: gradient per semantic (teal/amber/coral/slate)
- Radius: 20px
- Padding: 16px
- Text: white or dark depending on gradient
- Shadow: matching gradient color at 25% opacity, 0 10px 24px -6px

**List Item**
- Background: `#ffffff`
- Border-bottom: 1px solid `#f1f5f9`
- Padding: 14px 16px
- Pressed: `rgba(20,184,166,0.06)` background

### Inputs

**Text Input / TextArea**
- Background: `#f8fafc`
- Border: 1px solid `#e2e8f0`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 14px 16px
- Placeholder: `#94a3b8`
- Focus border: `#14b8a6`
- Font: 15px / 1.5

**Segmented Picker**
- Background: `#f1f5f9`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 4px
- Selected: `#ffffff` with shadow `0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)`, text Teal 700
- Unselected: transparent, text Slate 500

**Filter Chip**
- Background: `#f1f5f9` or `#ffffff` border
- Radius: 999px
- Padding: 8px 14px
- Active: `#0f766e` text + `#ccfbf1` bg

### Badges

- **低风险 / 正常**: Teal 50 bg, Teal 700 text, radius 999px
- **中风险 / 待处理**: Amber 50 bg, Amber 600 text, radius 999px
- **高风险 / 逾期**: Coral 50 bg, Coral 600 text, radius 999px
- **已完成 / 已关闭**: Slate 100 bg, Slate 700 text

### Empty State
- Centered illustration (SVG icon in teal)
- Title: 18px weight 600 Slate 800
- Subtitle: 14px Slate 500
- CTA: Primary or Ghost button below

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing System
- Base unit: 4px
- Scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64

### Container
- Content max-width: 390px, centered.
- Horizontal page padding: 16px.
- Header top safe area: 44px (status bar placeholder).
- Bottom safe area: 28px above tab bar.

### Page Shell
- Page background: `#f0fdfa` or subtle radial gradient `radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, #ccfbf1 0%, #f0fdfa 55%)`.
- Top header: 56px height, white or transparent, title centered, optional right icon.
- Scroll content: `padding-bottom: 100px` to clear bottom tab bar.
- Bottom tab bar: floating capsule 48px tall, 16px from edges, 12px from bottom, radius 999px.

### Card Composition
- Metric cards in a 2-column grid, gap 12px.
- List sections stack with 16px gap between section title and list.
- Each list item uses row flex: leading icon/status dot → content → trailing action.

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Shadow / Treatment | Use |
|-------|--------------------|-----|
| 0 (flat) | none | page background, dividers |
| 1 (card) | `0 6px 18px -6px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)` | small chips, pressed inputs |
| 2 (card lifted) | `0 10px 25px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)` | standard cards |
| 3 (floating) | `0 12px 32px -10px rgba(15,23,42,0.12)` | bottom sheet, dialogs, FAB |
| 4 (scrim) | `rgba(15,23,42,0.45)` overlay | modal scrim |

## 7. Iconography

- All icons are line-style SVGs with 1.5px stroke, 24px viewBox, rounded caps.
- Contextual `<title>` tags must be injected inline for every SVG.
- Icon color matches text role: Slate 400 (tertiary), Slate 600 (secondary), Teal 500 (active/brand), Amber 500 (warning), Coral 500 (danger).
- Preferred icons from local asset library:
  - Home: `home`
  - Inspection: `shield-check` or `clipboard-check`
  - Records: `file-text`
  - Contacts: `phone`
  - Dashboard: `layout-dashboard`
  - Risk: `alert-triangle`
  - Add: `plus`
  - Search: `search`
  - Call: `phone`
  - Chevron: `chevron-right`
  - Clock: `clock`
  - Location: `map-pin`
  - Camera: `camera`
  - Check: `check`
  - More: `more-horizontal`

## 8. Responsive Behavior

- Mobile-first single column within 390–420px max-width.
- Bottom tab bar remains fixed bottom with safe-area insets.
- Charts adapt width to container; maintain 16:9 or 2:1 aspect ratio.
- Long text wraps; list items never truncate below 2 lines (use multiline).

## 9. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces / Routes / Tabs

| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID | Notes |

| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home | Daily overview with quick actions |

input.content:
# Pinankou Design System (Refined)

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

Pinankou is a safety operations companion that feels **calm, credible, and quietly premium**. The interface avoids the cold utilitarian look of typical enterprise apps by using a blue-green "safe harbor" palette, soft glass-morphism cards, and carefully orchestrated color temperature shifts. Warm amber and coral appear as controlled signals — never decoration — so users instantly understand what needs attention.

The design language blends:

(Same as DESIGN.md — preserved.)

| inspections | inspections-page | pages/Inspections | tab-inspections |
| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records |
| risk-report | risk-report-page | pages/RiskReport | — |

| rectification | rectification-page | pages/Rectification | tab-rectification |

- `risk-title-input`, `risk-severity-picker`, `risk-submit-button`, `risk-cancel-button`
- `contacts-search-input`, `contacts-add-button`, `contacts-list`, `contact-call-button`

### Events Preserved

## 9. Rationale for Changes from DESIGN.md

- Expanded palette with a cyan accent and richer neutral scale to avoid flatness.

input.content:
# Pinankou Design System (Final)

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

Pinankou is a safety-operations companion for frontline teams. The interface reads as **calm authority with premium warmth**: a blue-green "safe harbor" palette is punctuated by amber and coral signals that guide attention without alarm. Cards feel like frosted glass panels floating over a softly tinted canvas, while rounded pills, generous spacing, and tabular numerals keep dense data legible on a tall phone screen.

The design avoids generic enterprise coldness by:
- Using **gradient-filled cards** for hero metrics instead of flat colored boxes.
- Adding a **subtle radial glow** behind the page header.
- Floating the bottom tab bar as a **capsule with a soft teal border glow**.
- Keeping shadows diffused and color-matched to each card's gradient.
- Using **warm signal colors only on severity, status, and overdue states**.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Blue-green safety palette (teal/cyan) with amber/coral signal accents.
- Layered cards with gradient backgrounds, 1px translucent colored borders, and soft diffused shadows.
- Floating bottom navigation capsule.
- Line-style SVG icons, 24px, 1.5px stroke, rounded caps, with contextual `<title>` tags.
- Oversized metric numbers with tabular numerals.
- Full-pill primary CTAs with gradient fill and colored shadow.

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Brand / Trust
- **Teal 50** `#f0fdfa` — page background wash.
- **Teal 100** `#ccfbf1` — gradient end, selection bg, badge bg.
- **Teal 200** `#99f6e4` — hover/pressed tints, chart fill.
- **Teal 300** `#5eead4` — decorative glows.
- **Teal 400** `#2dd4bf` — secondary accent, active icon.
- **Teal 500** `#14b8a6` — primary brand, CTA gradient start.
- **Teal 600** `#0d9488` — pressed CTA, link text.
- **Teal 700** `#0f766e` — strong headings, active tab label.
- **Cyan 500** `#06b6d4` — chart accent, secondary highlight.

### Signal Accents
- **Amber 50** `#fffbeb` — warning badge bg.
- **Amber 100** `#fef3c7` — warning card gradient end.
- **Amber 400** `#fbbf24` — medium-risk dot.
- **Amber 500** `#f59e0b` — warning icon, pending state.
- **Amber 600** `#d97706` — warning text.
- **Coral 50** `#fff1f2` — high-risk bg.
- **Coral 100** `#ffe4e6` — danger card gradient end.
- **Coral 400** `#fb7185` — high-risk dot.
- **Coral 500** `#f43f5e` — high-risk text, overdue, destructive.
- **Coral 600** `#e11d48` — destructive pressed.

### Neutrals
- **White** `#ffffff` — cards, nav capsule, inputs.
- **Slate 25** `#fbfcfd` — alternate section bg.
- **Slate 50** `#f8fafc` — input bg, chip bg.
- **Slate 100** `#f1f5f9` — divider, disabled bg.
- **Slate 200** `#e2e8f0` — input border, hairline.
- **Slate 300** `#cbd5e1` — placeholder subtle.
- **Slate 400** `#94a3b8` — tertiary text, icons.
- **Slate 500** `#64748b` — secondary text.
- **Slate 600** `#475569` — captions, meta.
- **Slate 700** `#334155` — strong secondary.
- **Slate 800** `#1e293b` — primary text, headings.
- **Slate 900** `#0f172a` — maximum emphasis, scrim.

### Surfaces & Elevation
- **Page background**: `#f0fdfa` plus `radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 55% at 50% -5%, #ccfbf1 0%, transparent 60%)`.
- **Card default**: `linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%)`, border `1px solid rgba(20,184,166,0.10)`, radius 20px, shadow `0 10px 28px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)`.
- **Card teal**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6 0%, #0d9488 100%)`, white text, shadow `0 12px 28px -8px rgba(13,148,136,0.35)`.
- **Card amber**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%)`, white text, shadow `0 12px 28px -8px rgba(245,158,11,0.35)`.
- **Card coral**: `linear-gradient(135deg, #f43f5e 0%, #e11d48 100%)`, white text, shadow `0 12px 28px -8px rgba(225,29,72,0.35)`.
- **Bottom nav capsule**: `#ffffff`, border `1px solid rgba(20,184,166,0.12)`, shadow `0 -4px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.8) inset`.
- **Bottom sheet**: `#ffffff`, top radius 28px, shadow `0 -8px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.16)`.
- **Scrim**: `rgba(15,23,42,0.45)` with `backdrop-filter: blur(2px)`.

### States
- **Focus ring**: 2px solid `#14b8a6`, 2px offset.
- **Primary hover**: brightness 1.04, translateY -1px.
- **Primary active**: scale 0.98.
- **Disabled**: bg `rgba(148,163,184,0.25)`, text `#94a3b8`.
- **List pressed**: `rgba(20,184,166,0.06)`.
- **Selected chip**: bg `#ccfbf1`, text `#0f766e`, border `#99f6e4`.

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Family
- Primary: `HarmonyOS Sans SC`, fallback `PingFang SC, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`.
- Numerals: `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`.

### Hierarchy

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Color |
|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Hero Metric | 40px | 700 | 1.05 | -1px | White / Slate 800 |
| Page Title | 24px | 700 | 1.25 | -0.3px | Slate 800 |
| Section Title | 18px | 600 | 1.3 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Card Title | 16px | 600 | 1.35 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.55 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Body Emphasis | 15px | 600 | 1.55 | 0 | Slate 800 |
| Caption | 13px | 400 | 1.45 | 0 | Slate 500 |
| Micro | 12px | 500 | 1.35 | 0 | Slate 400 |
| Micro Teal | 12px | 600 | 1.35 | 0 | Teal 600 |
| Tab Label | 11px | 500 | 1.2 | 0 | Slate 400 / Teal 600 active |
| Button Large | 16px | 600 | 1 | 0 | White / Slate 800 |
| Button | 14px | 600 | 1 | 0 | White / Slate 800 |
| Badge | 11px | 600 | 1 | 0.2px | per role |

## 4. Component Stylings

### Buttons

**Primary CTA (Pill)**
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6 0%, #0d9488 100%)`
- Text: white, 16px, weight 600
- Padding: 14px 28px
- Radius: 999px
- Shadow: `0 8px 22px -6px rgba(20,184,166,0.45)`
- Icon: 20px white, leading, 8px margin
- Active: scale 0.98, shadow tighter

**Secondary Button**
- Background: white
- Border: 1px solid `#e2e8f0`
- Text: `#0f766e`, 14px, weight 600
- Padding: 12px 20px
- Radius: 14px
- Hover: bg `#f0fdfa`, border `#99f6e4`

**Ghost Button**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#0d9488`, 14px, weight 600
- Padding: 10px 14px
- Radius: 10px
- Active: bg `rgba(20,184,166,0.10)`

**FAB**
- Size: 56px circle
- Background: primary gradient
- Shadow: `0 12px 30px -8px rgba(20,184,166,0.55)`
- Icon: 24px white

**Destructive Button**
- Background: white
- Border: 1px solid `#ffe4e6`
- Text: `#e11d48`, 14px, weight 600
- Active: bg `#fff1f2`

### Inputs

**Text Input / TextArea**
- Background: `#f8fafc`
- Border: 1px solid `#e2e8f0`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 14px 16px
- Placeholder: `#94a3b8`
- Focus: border `#14b8a6`, shadow `0 0 0 3px rgba(20,184,166,0.12)`
- Font: 15px / 1.5

**Segmented Control**
- Background: `#f1f5f9`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 4px
- Option: radius 12px, padding 8px 16px, text `#64748b`
- Selected: bg white, shadow `0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)`, text `#0f766e`, weight 600

**Filter Chip**
- Default: bg `#f1f5f9`, text `#475569`
- Active: bg `#ccfbf1`, text `#0f766e`, border `1px solid #99f6e4`
- Radius: 999px
- Padding: 8px 14px

**Slider**
- Track: `#e2e8f0`, height 8px, radius 999px
- Fill: `linear-gradient(90deg, #14b8a6, #0d9488)`
- Thumb: 22px white circle, shadow `0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18)`, border `2px solid #14b8a6`

### Cards

**Standard Card**
- bg gradient, border, radius 20px, padding 16px, shadow.
- Optional colored top stripe 4px for severity/status cards.

**Metric Card**
- 2-column grid, gap 12px.
- Gradient background, white text.
- Large metric number + small label.
- Trailing mini icon (white, 24px).

**List Item**
- bg white, radius 16px, padding 14px 16px.
- 1px border bottom `#f1f5f9` (internal list only).
- Leading status dot or icon, title + meta, trailing chevron or action.

### Bottom Sheet
- Top radius 28px, bg white.
- Handle bar: 40px × 4px, `#e2e8f0`, radius 999px, centered, 12px top margin.
- Header: title + close icon.
- Content padding: 16px 20px 28px.
- CTA row at bottom with safe-area padding.

### Tab Bar
- Floating capsule: height 64px (includes safe-area), radius 999px, 16px horizontal inset, 12px from bottom.
- 5 tabs, equal width.
- Inactive: icon 24px `#94a3b8`, label 11px `#94a3b8`.
- Active: icon 24px `#14b8a6`, label 11px `#0f766e`, weight 600.
- Optional notification dot: 8px coral circle.

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing
- Base 4px; scale 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64.

### Container
- Max-width 390px, centered.
- Page horizontal padding: 16px.
- Status bar height: 44px.
- Header height: 56px.
- Tab bar + safe area: 84px reserved at bottom.

### Page Structure
- Background: teal wash + radial highlight at top center.
- Header: left title + optional right icon.
- Scroll content: padding-bottom 100px.
- Sections stack with 24px vertical gap.
- Within a section: title row (16px/18px) then 12px gap then content.

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Shadow | Use |
|-------|--------|-----|
| 0 | none | background, dividers |
| 1 | `0 4px 12px -4px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)` | chips, small buttons |
| 2 | `0 10px 28px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)` | cards |
| 3 | `0 12px 36px -10px rgba(15,23,42,0.12)` | sheet, dialog, FAB |
| 4 | scrim overlay | modal scrim |

## 7. Iconography

- All icons 24px line-style, 1.5px stroke, rounded caps.
- Contextual `<title>` tags injected inline.
- Colors: Slate 400 (muted), Slate 600 (secondary), Teal 500 (active), Amber 500 (warning), Coral 500 (danger).
- Local SVG map:
  - Home: `home`
  - Inspection: `shield-check`
  - Records: `file-text`
  - Contacts: `phone`
  - Dashboard: `layout-dashboard`
  - Risk: `alert-triangle`
  - Add: `plus`
  - Search: `search`
  - Call: `phone`
  - Chevron: `chevron-right`
  - Clock: `clock`
  - Location: `map-pin`
  - Camera: `camera`
  - Check: `check`
  - More: `more-horizontal`
  - Trash: `trash-2`
  - User: `user`
  - Calendar: `calendar`
  - Trending up: `trending-up`
  - Activity: `activity`

## 8. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces / Routes / Tabs

| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
| inspections | inspections-page | pages/Inspections | tab-inspections |
| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records |
| risk-report | risk-report-page | pages/RiskReport | — |
| contacts | contacts-page | pages/Contacts | tab-contacts |
| rectification | rectification-page | pages/Rectification | tab-rectification |
| dashboard | dashboard-page | pages/Dashboard | tab-dashboard |

### Action / Input / Assertion Targets

Preserved IDs and events match `.arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json`. Key targets:
- `home-summary-open-risks`, `home-quick-action-report`, `home-recent-records-list`
- `inspections-start-round-button`, `inspections-history-list`, `inspection-checkin-button`
- `records-search-input`, `records-add-button`, `records-list`, `record-save-button`
- `risk-title-input`, `risk-severity-picker`, `risk-submit-button`, `risk-cancel-button`
- `contacts-search-input`, `contacts-add-button`, `contacts-list`, `contact-call-button`
- `rectification-segment-pending`, `rectification-list`, `rectification-update-progress-button`
- `dashboard-period-picker`, `dashboard-stat-total-records`, `dashboard-risk-trend-chart`, `dashboard-top-risks-list`

### Events Preserved

All events from ui-tree.json are unchanged.

## 9. Rationale for Changes from DESIGN1.md

- Polished metric numerals and added tabular-nums guidance.
- Clarified bottom nav capsule height includes safe-area.
- Refined radial background position to keep the glow in the top 600vp.
- Confirmed all semantic IDs, routes, tab IDs, and events are preserved with no gaps.

- Fill: `linear-gradient(90deg, #14b8a6, #0d9488)`
- Thumb: 22px white circle, shadow `0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.18)`, border `2px solid #14b8a6`

### Cards

**Standard Card**
- bg gradient, border, radius 20px, padding 16px, shadow.
- Optional colored top stripe 4px for severity/status cards.

**Metric Card**
- 2-column grid, gap 12px.
- Gradient background, white text.
- Large metric number + small label.
- Trailing mini icon (white, 24px).

**List Item**
- bg white, radius 16px, padding 14px 16px.
- 1px border bottom `#f1f5f9` (internal list only).
- Leading status dot or icon, title + meta, trailing chevron or action.

### Bottom Sheet
- Top radius 28px, bg white.
- Handle bar: 40px × 4px, `#e2e8f0`, radius 999px, centered, 12px top margin.
- Header: title + close icon.
- Content padding: 16px 20px 28px.
- CTA row at bottom with safe-area padding.

### Tab Bar
- Floating capsule: height 64px (includes safe-area), radius 999px, 16px horizontal inset, 12px from bottom.
- 5 tabs, equal width.
- Inactive: icon 24px `#94a3b8`, label 11px `#94a3b8`.
- Active: icon 24px `#14b8a6`, label 11px `#0f766e`, weight 600.
- Optional notification dot: 8px coral circle.

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing
- Base 4px; scale 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64.

### Container
- Max-width 390px, centered.
- Page horizontal padding: 16px.
- Status bar height: 44px.
- Header height: 56px.
- Tab bar + safe area: 84px reserved at bottom.

### Page Structure
- Background: teal wash + radial highlight at top center.
- Header: left title + optional right icon.
- Scroll content: padding-bottom 100px.
- Sections stack with 24px vertical gap.
- Within a section: title row (16px/18px) then 12px gap then content.

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Shadow | Use |
|-------|--------|-----|
| 0 | none | background, dividers |
| 1 | `0 4px 12px -4px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)` | chips, small buttons |
| 2 | `0 10px 28px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)` | cards |
| 3 | `0 12px 36px -10px rgba(15,23,42,0.12)` | sheet, dialog, FAB |
| 4 | scrim overlay | modal scrim |

## 7. Iconography

- All icons 24px line-style, 1.5px stroke, rounded caps.
- Contextual `<title>` tags injected inline.
- Colors: Slate 400 (muted), Slate 600 (secondary), Teal 500 (active), Amber 500 (warning), Coral 500 (danger).
- Local SVG map:
  - Home: `home`
  - Inspection: `shield-check`
  - Records: `file-text`
  - Contacts: `phone`
  - Dashboard: `layout-dashboard`
  - Risk: `alert-triangle`
  - Add: `plus`
  - Search: `search`
  - Call: `phone`
  - Chevron: `chevron-right`
  - Clock: `clock`
  - Location: `map-pin`
  - Camera: `camera`
  - Check: `check`
  - More: `more-horizontal`
  - Trash: `trash-2`
  - User: `user`
  - Calendar: `calendar`
  - Trending up: `trending-up`
  - Activity: `activity`

## 8. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces / Routes / Tabs

| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
| inspections | inspections-page | pages/Inspections | tab-inspections |
| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records |
| risk-report | risk-report-page | pages/RiskReport | — |
| contacts | contacts-page | pages/Contacts | tab-contacts |
| rectification | rectification-page | pages/Rectification | tab-rectification |
| dashboard | dashboard-page | pages/Dashboard | tab-dashboard |

### Action / Input / Assertion Targets

Preserved IDs and events match `.arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json`. Key targets:
- `home-summary-open-risks`, `home-quick-action-report`, `home-recent-records-list`
- `inspections-start-round-button`, `inspections-history-list`, `inspection-checkin-button`
- `records-search-input`, `records-add-button`, `records-list`, `record-save-button`
- `risk-title-input`, `risk-severity-picker`, `risk-submit-button`, `risk-cancel-button`
- `contacts-search-input`, `contacts-add-button`, `contacts-list`, `contact-call-button`
- `rectification-segment-pending`, `rectification-list`, `rectification-update-progress-button`
- `dashboard-period-picker`, `dashboard-stat-total-records`, `dashboard-risk-trend-chart`, `dashboard-top-risks-list`

### Events Preserved

All events from ui-tree.json are unchanged.

## 9. Rationale for Changes from DESIGN1.md

- Polished metric numerals and added tabular-nums guidance.
- Clarified bottom nav capsule height includes safe-area.
- Refined radial background position to keep the glow in the top 600vp.
- Confirmed all semantic IDs, routes, tab IDs, and events are preserved with no gaps.

content.subject: Generate visual design system DESIGN.md

content.subject: Review and refine DESIGN1.md / DESIGN2.md
content.description: Critique DESIGN.md for non-generic, premium visual quality; produce DESIGN1.md and, if needed, DESIGN2.md while preserving semantic bindings.

content.subject: Create high-fidelity HTML page artifacts
content.description: Generate page-<page-id>.html files for each route-worthy surface using local SVG icons, contextual SVG titles, mobile constraints, bottom tab bar, and semantic data-ui-id bindings.

content.subject: Write design alignment plan
content.description: Create .arkpilot/plans/design-alignment.md mapping semantic IDs, events, visual tokens, per-page notes, and HTML-to-ArkUI guidance.

input.content:
# Pinankou Design Alignment Plan

## 1. Visual Inputs

- **Semantic UI protocol**: `.arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json`
- **Final design artifact**: `.arkpilot/designs/DESIGN2.md`
- **HTML artifacts**:
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-home-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-inspections-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-records-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-risk-report-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-contacts-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-rectification-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-dashboard-page.html`
- **Route-worthy surfaces**: home, inspections, records, risk-report, contacts, rectification, dashboard

## 2. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces / Routes / Tabs

| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID | HTML Artifact |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|---------------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home | page-home-page.html |
| inspections | inspections-page | pages/Inspections | tab-inspections | page-inspections-page.html |
| records | records-page | pages/Records | tab-records | page-records-page.html |
| risk-report | risk-report-page | pages/RiskReport | — | page-risk-report-page.html |
| contacts | contacts-page | pages/Contacts | tab-contacts | page-contacts-page.html |
| rectification | rectification-page | pages/Rectification | tab-rectification | page-rectification-page.html |
| dashboard | dashboard-page | pages/Dashboard | tab-dashboard | page-dashboard-page.html |

### Preserved Action / Input / Assertion / List IDs

All `data-ui-id` values in HTML artifacts map to `ui-tree.json` semantic targets. Key IDs by surface:

**Home**
- `home-page-title` — page header assertion
- `home-summary-open-risks`, `home-summary-pending-rectifications`, `home-summary-today-inspections`, `home-summary-completion-rate` — metric assertions
- `home-quick-action-report` → `open-risk-report-sheet`
- `home-quick-action-inspect` → `navigate-inspections`
- `home-quick-action-record` → `open-add-record-sheet`

**Inspections**
- `inspections-start-round-button` → `start-inspection-round`
- `inspections-history-list` with items `inspection-history-{id}`
- `inspection-in-progress-sheet`

**Records**

**Risk Report**
- `risk-title-input`, `risk-severity-picker`, `risk-location-input`, `risk-description-input`

### Repeated Item Patterns

- Home recent records: `home-recent-record-{id}`
- Home rectification preview: `home-rectification-{id}`
- Inspections history: `inspection-history-{id}`
- Records list: `record-item-{id}`
- Contacts list: `contact-item-{id}`

### Events Preserved

All events from `ui-tree.json` are preserved without rename. See `ui-tree.json` events section for the full list.

## 3. Visual Requirements

### Color Tokens

| Token | Value | Use |
|-------|-------|-----|
| Page bg | `#f0fdfa` + radial teal glow | all pages |
| Card bg | gradient white→slate-50 | standard cards |
| Primary gradient | `#14b8a6` → `#0d9488` | CTAs, teal metric cards, active states |
| Amber gradient | `#f59e0b` → `#d97706` | warning metric cards, medium severity |
| Coral gradient | `#f43f5e` → `#e11d48` | danger metric cards, high severity, overdue |
| Slate gradient | `#334155` → `#1e293b` | neutral metric cards |
| Text primary | `#1e293b` | headings, body |
| Text secondary | `#64748b` | captions, meta |
| Text tertiary | `#94a3b8` | placeholders, inactive tab icons |
| Border | `#e2e8f0` / `rgba(20,184,166,0.10)` | inputs, cards |

### Typography

- Page title: 24px / 700 / -0.3px / `#0f172a`
- Section title: 18px / 600 / `#1e293b`
- Card title: 16px / 600
- Body: 15px / 400 / 1.55
- Caption: 13px / `#64748b`
- Metric value: 28-40px / 700 / tabular-nums
- Tab label: 11px / 500 (active 600)
- Button: 14-16px / 600

### Spacing

- Page horizontal padding: 16px
- Section gap: 24px
- Card padding: 16px
- List item gap: 10px
- Metric grid gap: 12px
- Bottom safe-area reserved: 100px content padding

### Elevation

- Standard card: `0 10px 28px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)`
- Gradient metric card: color-matched shadow at 0.35 opacity
- FAB: `0 12px 30px -8px rgba(20,184,166,0.55)`
- Bottom sheet: `0 -8px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.16)`
- Floating tab bar: combined soft shadows + teal border

### Components

- **Buttons**: primary = full-pill gradient; secondary = white 14px radius; destructive = white with coral tint.
- **Inputs**: `#f8fafc` bg, 14px radius, teal focus ring.
- **Segmented control**: `#f1f5f9` track, white selected pill with shadow.
- **Slider**: 8px track, teal fill, white thumb with teal border.
- **Cards**: 20px radius, optional 4px top stripe for status.
- **Badges**: pill, color-coded per severity/status.
- **Bottom tab bar**: floating capsule, 5 tabs, active icon+label teal.

### Per-Page Polish Notes

**Home**
- 2×2 metric grid must be visible in top 600vp.
- Quick-action row uses 3 equal cards with gradient icons.
- Recent records and urgent rectifications use horizontal list items.

**Inspections**
- Status card shows current round progress.
- Primary CTA starts a new round; existing round opens bottom sheet.
- History list uses shield-check icon with status badge.

**Records**
- Search input + filter chips sticky below header.
- FAB floats above tab bar for add record.
- Bottom sheet for add/edit record with title, category, location, description.

**Risk Report**
- Standalone page with back button.
- Severity segmented control (low/medium/high).
- Photo picker grid with add thumb + placeholder thumbs.

**Contacts**
- Search + avatar list.
- Call button on each row.
- FAB for add contact; bottom sheet for form.

**Rectification**
- Status segments at top.
- List items include mini progress bar.
- Bottom sheet for progress slider + status picker.

**Dashboard**
- Period picker in header.
- 2×2 metric grid.
- Bar chart for risk trend.
- SVG donut chart for category distribution.
- Top risks list below charts.

### Responsive Constraints

- Max content width: 390px, centered.
- Tab bar fixed bottom, max-width 358px, 16px inset, 12px from bottom.
- No side navigation.
- All lists and grids scale within the 390px canvas.

## 4. HTML-to-ArkUI Mapping Notes

- Page root maps to `NavDestination` or `Page` with `data-page-id` as `.id(...)` reference.
- Bottom tab bar maps to `Tabs` + `TabContent`; active tab state driven by selected index.
- Cards map to `Column` with gradient background, border, radius, shadow.
- Metric grid maps to `Grid` or `Flex` with 2 columns.
- List items map to `ListItem` inside `List`; repeated IDs via template binding.
- Bottom sheets map to `BindSheet` / `Sheet` with top radius and scrim.
- FAB maps to `Button` with circle shape and gradient background.
- SVG icons in HTML are references; in ArkUI use `SymbolGlyph`, `Image($r('app.media...'))`, or inline SVG components.
- Charts in HTML are static CSS/SVG; in ArkUI use `LineChart`/`PieChart` from ArkUI charts kit or custom `Canvas`.

## 5. Non-Negotiable Constraints

- Do not rename semantic IDs, page IDs, routes, tab IDs, or event names.
- HTML artifacts are the final visual reference.
- `ui-tree.json` is the semantic binding protocol, not a layout tree.
- Bottom tab bar must stay at the bottom in a floating capsule.
- Every inline SVG must keep a contextual `<title>` tag in the final ArkUI equivalent via accessibility labels.
- Do not add seeded demo data as a functional requirement; sample data in HTML is visual-only.
- Do not introduce new surfaces or data models beyond the spec.

## 6. Semantic Change Requests

- None. All semantic targets from `ui-tree.json` map cleanly to the final HTML artifacts.
- Risk-report surface is rendered as a standalone page in HTML but can also be opened as a sheet from Home/Records/Inspections. Event names remain the same in both contexts.
